name: maintenance
description: Cleans up and organizes project files. Use when user mentions '整理', 'cleanup', 'アーカイブ', 'archive', '肥大化', 'Plans.md', 'session-log', or asks to clean up old tasks, archive completed items, or organize files. Do NOT load for: 実装作業, レビュー, 新機能開発, デプロイ.
capabilities: Archives completed tasks older than 7 days from Plans.md to an archive section
Splits session-log.md into monthly files when it exceeds 500 lines
Warns when CLAUDE.md exceeds 100 lines and suggests splitting into docs/
Creates automatic backups before cleaning files
Detects cleanup needs based on file size and task completion dates
Supports dry-run mode to preview cleanup actions before execution
author: Chachamaru127
securitySummary: All 60 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES. The flagged code exists in documentation files (auto-cleanup/doc.md), not executable code. Bash command examples use hardcoded strings with no user input. The YAML frontmatter '---' was misidentified as weak cryptography. This is a benign file cleanup utility for managing Plans.md, session-log.md, and CLAUDE.md.
valueStatement: Project documentation files like Plans.md and session-log.md grow large over time, making them difficult to manage. This skill automatically archives completed tasks, splits oversized logs by month, and keeps your project documentation organized and readable.
userTitle: Clean up and organize project documentation
limitations: Only manages Plans.md, session-log.md, and CLAUDE.md files
Does not clean binary files, logs, or build artifacts
Cannot restore accidentally archived tasks without manual intervention
WIP tasks marked with cc:WIP or pm:依頼中 are protected from archiving

useCases.title: Keep project plans tidy
useCases.description: Automatically move completed tasks to an archive section after 7 days, keeping Plans.md focused on active work.

useCases.title: Manage session history
useCases.description: Split growing session logs into monthly archived files, keeping current sessions fast and searchable.

useCases.title: Optimize CLAUDE.md size
useCases.description: Receive warnings when CLAUDE.md becomes too large and get guidance on splitting into topic-specific files.

promptTemplates.title: Quick cleanup
promptTemplates.scenario: When user wants to clean up files
promptTemplates.prompt: Clean up my project files. Archive completed tasks from Plans.md and organize session logs.

promptTemplates.title: Preview changes
promptTemplates.scenario: When user wants to see what would change
promptTemplates.prompt: Show me what cleanup actions would be performed. Run cleanup in dry-run mode.

promptTemplates.title: Selective cleanup
promptTemplates.scenario: When user wants to clean specific files
promptTemplates.prompt: Clean up Plans.md only. Archive old completed tasks but leave session logs alone.

promptTemplates.title: Automated check
promptTemplates.scenario: At session start to check file health
promptTemplates.prompt: Check my project files. Are there any that need cleanup based on the size thresholds?

bestPractices: Run cleanup regularly, such as at the end of each sprint or weekly
Review archived tasks monthly to ensure nothing important was accidentally moved
Configure thresholds in .claude-code-harness.config.yaml to match your project needs
antiPatterns: Using cleanup on files that are actively being edited by multiple team members simultaneously
Archiving tasks that still need reference without keeping a backup copy
Ignoring CLAUDE.md size warnings, which can slow down Claude Code context loading

faq.question: What files does this skill manage?
faq.answer: It manages Plans.md, session-log.md, and CLAUDE.md files. Other file types are not affected.

faq.question: Will it delete my tasks?
faq.answer: No. Completed tasks are moved to an archive section within Plans.md or split into monthly files. Original data is preserved.

faq.question: Can I customize the size thresholds?
faq.answer: Yes. Edit .claude-code-harness.config.yaml to set custom values for max_lines and archive_after_days.

faq.question: Is my data safe during cleanup?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill creates automatic backups before making changes. You can also use dry-run mode to preview first.

faq.question: What happens to work in progress tasks?
faq.answer: WIP tasks marked with cc:WIP or pm:依頼中 are protected and will not be archived, even if completed.

faq.question: How is this different from other cleanup tools?
faq.answer: This skill uses LLM evaluation to make smart recommendations based on task age and completion status, not just file size.
